subject: [PATCH v3 00/28] vfs/nfsd: add support for CB_NOTIFY callbacks in directory delegations

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Identified a need to add support for CB_NOTIFY callbacks in directory delegations and proposed a solution by modifying various kernel components. The patches have been posted for review, but there are no substantive replies yet.

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch series adds support for CB_NOTIFY callbacks in directory delegations, enabling the server to notify clients about changes within a directory without losing its lease. The patches modify various kernel components, including filelock, fsnotify, and nfsd, to implement this feature.
